code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{supabase}from'../supabaseClient';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Leaderboard=()=>{const[leaders,setLeaders]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchLeaders=async()=>{const{data}=await supabase.from('profiles').select('username, elo').order('elo',{ascending:false}).limit(10);if(data)setLeaders(data);};fetchLeaders();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"leaderboard",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Top Players"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Rank"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Player"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"ELO"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:leaders.map((player,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:index+1}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:player.username}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:player.elo})]},index))})]})]});};export default Leaderboard;
